summary: Phase M0 has been corrected against the authoritative third-round verifier report without adding implementation code or M1+ scope. The owning build, governance, CLI, CI, and security contracts now assign one exact error and terminal state to every cited RSS/deadline/timeout bound, with exact-bound and first-over fixtures mirrored in the finite security reconciliation table. The pull-request and release secret-scan contracts now freeze and scan canonical raw path/source metadata as an ordinary population entry, bind its digest from the excluded final manifest, retain only deterministic digest-derived displays in the final control pair, forbid raw unmatched source strings, and test metadata-only canaries across both profiles. All seven M0 specs remain Draft in SPECS.md with accurate dependencies, every FR/NFR remains mapped to retained verification evidence, and there are no open questions.
